cli.errors.needs_auth: Reconnect this CLI in Settings → Integrations to keep using it.
cli.errors.needs_auth.claude_code: Your Claude Code subscription needs reconnecting in Settings → Integrations.
cli.errors.needs_auth.gemini_cli: Your Gemini CLI account needs reconnecting in Settings → Integrations.
cli.errors.needs_auth.copilot_cli: Your GitHub Copilot CLI seat needs reconnecting in Settings → Integrations.
cli.errors.needs_auth.qwen_code: Qwen Code is not connected. Add your DashScope API key in Settings → Integrations to enable Qwen routing.
cli.errors.needs_auth.aider: Aider is not connected. Add your provider API key (Anthropic / OpenAI / DeepSeek / etc.) in Settings → Integrations.
cli.errors.workspace_untrusted: This workspace isn't marked as trusted for the selected CLI. Run the CLI's auth flow once.
cli.errors.api_disabled: The selected CLI's cloud API isn't enabled for your account.
cli.errors.quota_exhausted: Your CLI subscription hit its rate limit; we tried other CLIs in your chain.
cli.errors.recursion_depth_exceeded: Agent fallback chain too deep — refusing to fan out further.
cli.errors.recursion_cycle: Agent fallback chain has a cycle — refusing to repeat the same agent.
cli.errors.unknown_failure: The CLI returned an unrecognised error; the snippet is in the operator log.
